philosophy: Open Standard, Protected Core, Zero E-Waste

milestones.title: Autonomous Gatekeeper Implementation
milestones.description: Deployment of the AI-driven PR review system and formal verification layers.

tasks.description: Integration of the Stochastic Review Agent with the project repository.
Implementation of Formal Verification checks for Core stability.

milestones.title: Scalability & Corporate Licensing Engine
milestones.description: Development of the multi-node detection system and license key orchestration.

tasks.description: Node-count detection logic for single-node vs. cluster deployments.
API integration for automated corporate dividend distribution to contributors.

milestones.title: Hardware-Software Circularity
milestones.description: Optimizing software for extended hardware lifecycle and e-waste reduction.

tasks.description: Zero E-Waste Telemetry: Monitoring hardware health to suggest maintenance, repair or end of life for recycling.
Low-power mode optimization for legacy hardware nodes.

milestones.title: Technological Sovereignty & Open IAM
milestones.description: Migration of core backend identity services to open-source, self-hostable alternatives to prevent vendor lock-in.

tasks.description: Migrate from Firebase Auth to Supabase (PostgreSQL-based IAM) for backend identity management.

excluded_scopes.proprietary_cloud: No integration with non-standardized proprietary cloud providers.
excluded_scopes.telemetry: No collection of user data beyond hardware health and licensing node-counts.
excluded_scopes.obsolescence: Any feature promoting planned obsolescence is strictly prohibited.
